tiers.name: Friend of PYT
tiers.description: Celebration of your support with (optional) name recognition on all published materials, on and offline.

tiers.name: PYT Patron
tiers.description: Signed, framed cast and crew photos of the current season productions. Celebration of your support with (optional) name recognition on all published materials, on and offline.

tiers.name: Producer
tiers.description: Back stage tours for current season productions. Signed, framed cast and crew photos of the current season productions. Celebration of your support with (optional) name recognition on all published materials, on and offline.

tiers.name: Executive Producer
tiers.description: Present annual awards to actors and staff. Back stage tours for current season productions. Signed, framed cast and crew photos of the current season productions. Celebration of your support with (optional) name recognition on all published materials, on and offline.
